message:
fix(agent): fix bugs in pt agent plan command

- Fix reversibility match: Quarantine is "reversible", Resume/Unfreeze/Unquarantine are "reversal"
- Fix confidence interval: prevent negative lower bound with .max(0.0)
- Fix directory creation: ensure decision/ dir exists before writing plan.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
